use log::debug;

fn process_request(req: &Request) {
    let large_payload = req.body();
    // BAD: Debug format of large value before log level check
    debug!("received request: {:?}", large_payload);
}

struct Request {
    body_bytes: Vec<u8>,
}

impl Request {
    fn body(&self) -> Vec<u8> {
        self.body_bytes.clone()
    }
}

impl std::fmt::Debug for Request {
    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {
        f.debug_struct("Request")
            .field("body_bytes", &self.body_bytes)
            .finish()
    }
}
